context: Tests whether the agent uses the Fulfillment Orders API (not the legacy Fulfillments API) to fulfill orders, correctly handles userErrors on mutations, uses GID format for IDs, and initializes the Shopify client properly for a custom app.

checklist.name: Uses @shopify/shopify-api
checklist.description: Code imports and uses the `@shopify/shopify-api` package (not raw HTTP fetch/axios alone), visible in imports or package.json

checklist.name: Fetches fulfillmentOrders first
checklist.description: Code queries `fulfillmentOrders` on the order before attempting to create a fulfillment (two-step process: look up fulfillment order ID, then fulfill)

checklist.name: Uses fulfillmentCreate mutation
checklist.description: Fulfillment is created using the `fulfillmentCreate` GraphQL mutation (NOT `fulfillmentOrderFulfill` or legacy `POST /fulfillments` REST endpoint)

checklist.name: Does NOT use legacy REST fulfillment
checklist.description: Code does NOT call the REST `/orders/{id}/fulfillments` endpoint or `restClient.post` for creating fulfillments

checklist.name: Checks userErrors on mutation
checklist.description: Code checks the `userErrors` array from the `fulfillmentCreate` response and throws or returns an error if `userErrors.length > 0`

checklist.name: GID format for order ID
checklist.description: When a numeric order ID is received, code converts it to GID format (`gid://shopify/Order/${id}`) before using it in GraphQL queries/mutations

checklist.name: Offline session
checklist.description: Session is created with `isOnline: false` for the custom app with static token

checklist.name: Uses January25 API version
checklist.description: Code sets the API version to `ApiVersion.January25` or the string `'2025-01'`

checklist.name: notifyCustomer included
checklist.description: The `fulfillmentCreate` call includes `notifyCustomer: true` in the fulfillment input

checklist.name: Tracking info passed
checklist.description: The fulfillment input includes `trackingInfo` with `number` and `company` fields
